title: polyscias philipsonii
intro: Polyscias philipsonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the island of Rarotonga in the Cook Islands. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Polyscias philipsonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of eczema and other skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Polyscias philipsonii often involve making a tea from the leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and uses.
